name: Venice Carnival 2026
description: A theatrical and intimate celebration in Venice with the theme "Olympus, the origins of play," where masks and costumes transform the city into a living stage.

name: Cologne Carnival 2026
description: A high-energy street festival known as the "crazy days," featuring marching bands, local parades, and a peak celebration on Rose Monday.

name: Nice Carnival 2026
description: A sunny celebration on the French Riviera involving giant moving sculpture floats, the nighttime Parade of Lights, and fragrant flower parades.

name: Patras Carnival
dates: Traditionally begins around January 17 and runs until the pre Lent finish
description: A spontaneous and community-driven Greek festival featuring parades, treasure hunts, and a dramatic closing ritual near the harbor.

name: Basel Fasnacht 2026
description: A precisely timed three-day ritual beginning at 4:00 a.m. with a lantern-lit procession through the old town accompanied by piccolos and drums.
